thoughts: Looks forward to a quieter life as a Keeper.
Hopes to preserve the Clan's stories.
Looks forward to guiding younger cats with {PRONOUN/m_c/poss} wisdom.
Feels {PRONOUN/m_c/subject} has earned a place among the Keepers.
Looks forward to watching over the Clan from the den.
Is ready to leave the burdens of patrols behind.
Hopes {PRONOUN/m_c/poss} experiences will help the next generation.
Finds comfort in the thought of becoming a Keeper.
